title: The Escape Begins
description: On pages 21–21, the escape begins focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.
scene: On pages 21–21, the escape begins focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.
summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
